decision: Record only exact source-linked top-view dimensions and freshly re-audited discrete contacts; keep every unproved closed footprint, perimeter, ownership region, center, orientation, and hidden sector blocked.

top_contact_reaudit.method: fresh exact RGB and coordinate audit against the authoritative native top panel

blocked_measurement_decisions.subject: C-001 filled outer footprint and center
blocked_measurement_decisions.reason: This pass did not establish a fully enumerated, closed, annotation-excluded source-owned boundary without inference.

blocked_measurement_decisions.subject: C-002 outer perimeter, inner CL-001 perimeter, visible annulus, and center
blocked_measurement_decisions.reason: Recovered CL-001 evidence is exact but deliberately discontinuous; closure and complete layer ownership are not authorized.

blocked_measurement_decisions.subject: C-003 outer perimeter, inner CL-002 perimeter, visible annulus, and center
blocked_measurement_decisions.reason: Recovered CL-002 evidence is exact but deliberately discontinuous; closure and complete layer ownership are not authorized.

blocked_measurement_decisions.subject: C-004 filled outer footprint and center
blocked_measurement_decisions.reason: Peripheral rubble, shadows, and discontinuous CL-003 ownership prevent an exact closed source-owned pixel set without interpretation.

blocked_measurement_decisions.subject: C-005, C-006, and C-007 physical centers and orientations
blocked_measurement_decisions.reason: Their physical identity or ownership remains ambiguous under U-001 through U-009 and cannot be promoted from appearance to geometry authority.

blocked_measurement_decisions.subject: CL-001, CL-002, and CL-003 closed perimeter centers
blocked_measurement_decisions.reason: Only exact discrete visible samples are authoritative; hidden and occluded closure remains forbidden.

flamestrike_output_approval.scope: Direct top dimensions and all 48 reverified contact pixels accepted; every footprint, perimeter, center, orientation, and hidden sector remains blocked.
